replies_today.reply: Unverified. Jackson's song "Palestine, Don't Cry" was never released. Only handwritten lyrics exist. The timing of accusations is a separate fact. No causal link proven.
Police racism disproportionately affects people of color, specifically Black individuals. Evidence does not support that official police policy requires racism against White people.
Israel has received more US foreign aid than any other country since WWII. But the peace/oil price link is highly speculative. No evidence connects aid withdrawal to instant peace or $2 gas drops.
Claim is unverified. Not false. Director Pierre Coffin confirmed the Minionese sequence. Empire Online reported it. The source is valid.
Claudia Sheinbaum confirmed the US refusal. Iran moved their base to Tijuana. This is about power, not logistics.
Mayor Zohran Mamdani signed that order, not Eric Adams. The claim attributes the action to the wrong person.
Parents do value their own time. Many also emphasize bedtime routines for child well-being and bonding. It's not one or the other.
No official confirmation exists yet for Argentina's 2026 World Cup kit schedule. Details like these come from FIFA or AFA, usually later.
